---

**User Story**

As a <type of user>
I want <some goal>
So that <some benefit>

---

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] <!-- Add specific, testable acceptance criteria -->
- [ ] <!-- Example: User can click "Create Task" button -->
- [ ] <!-- Example: Task appears in task list after creation -->

**Story Points**: <!-- Estimate using Fibonacci scale: 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13 -->

**Priority**: <!-- Add MoSCoW label: Must Have, Should Have, Could Have, Won't Have -->

**Sprint**: <!-- Assign to Sprint/Iteration -->

**Additional Notes**
<!-- Any additional context, dependencies, or technical considerations -->
